entries.title: Scythe
entries.author: Erik Alm
entries.description: 32 short, fast, brilliantly paced vanilla maps. One of the most loved megawads ever made.

entries.title: Scythe 2
entries.author: Erik Alm
entries.description: The bigger, harder sequel: 32 maps with new textures, from gothic ruins to brutal slaughter finales.

entries.title: Alien Vendetta
entries.author: Martin Aalen Hunsager & team
entries.description: A landmark 32-map megawad mixing classic adventure maps with epic large-scale battles.

entries.title: Hell Revealed
entries.author: Yonatan Donner & Haggay Niv
entries.description: The original hard-as-nails megawad. 32 maps built purely around vicious, fair combat.
entries.note: Very difficult. Play with Freedoom Phase 2 selected.

entries.title: Memento Mori II
entries.author: Various
entries.description: Classic 1996 community megawad: 32 polished maps with an original soundtrack and new graphics.

entries.title: Requiem
entries.author: Various (Iikka Keränen et al.)
entries.description: 32 maps famous for pushing the vanilla engine to its limits with stunning custom architecture.

entries.title: Icarus: Alien Vanguard
entries.author: TeamTNT
entries.description: TeamTNT's sci-fi megawad: 32 maps aboard a starship, on planets, and in simulation chambers.

entries.title: Eternal Doom
entries.author: Team Eternal / TeamTNT
entries.description: Huge, ornate medieval-castle maps full of exploration and puzzles. A slower, grander kind of Doom.
